articles.title: Trump slaps 50% tariffs on Canada and Carney vows to 'intensify' trade talks - BBC
articles.description: The duties mark a major escalation in trade tensions between the North American neighbours.
articles.content: Everyday consumer items like wine and hockey sticks, as well as industrial goods such as cement, are on the target list. Several key exports, though, will be spared, including energy, potash, critica… [+19 chars]

articles.title: Coffee lovers can take heart: Up to 5 cups a day appears safe for most adults, experts say - Fox News
articles.description: The American Heart Association says up to 400 milligrams of caffeine daily may lower risk of heart disease, stroke and Type 2 diabetes — with a key caveat.
articles.content:
Coffee drinkers may not have to feel guilty about reaching for another cup.

articles.title: Man stabs tourists near the Acropolis in Athens, Greece - AP News

articles.content:
